title: Windows To The Soul
wikitext:
[]: Windows To The Soul             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 23, 2005 11:25 am Hey, how come the mass produced Evas are the only Evas without eyes? I know your eyes are considered windows to the soul but does this have anything to do with it?

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Mon May 23, 2005 11:33 am just off of the top of my head- so probably wrong, but: they don't have a dominant soul like the other evas e.g. yui -unit 01. so it could be a representation of that or we could just be looking too deep into things again.......

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 23, 2005 11:41 am Well they seem to be able to move about exceptionally easily considering they can't see a damn thing! Eva 05: Hey man, i cant see a damn thing. Eva 06: I know man, creepy isn't it. *Sound of something being crushed* Eva 06: Wohh man. What the hell was that? Eva 05: I don't know. I think I stood on a tank! Hey wait a sec... ...they got no ears either. Eva 05: Hey man, do you hear that? Eva 06: WHAT!

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon May 23, 2005 12:00 pm One could conjecture a lot of theories here. I prefer the there for the look. In the movie Alien, the Alien was deliberately designed with no eyes, to increase the sense of alienness. Eye's are an important part of an individuals appearance and persona, and so to remove them from the MP Eva's in a sense depersonalises them. We think far less about the MP's having feelings I suppose. They come across as far colder beings. Not sure why they have such big rosy red smiles though?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 23, 2005 12:09 pm Well clearly they have no feelings. One of them walks around with half its brain hanging out. Ooooh. And it still smiles away. ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Not sure why they have such big rosy red smiles though?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon May 23, 2005 12:24 pm If you recall episode two, unit 01 didn't have eyes to start with either.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 23, 2005 12:27 pm Dave wrote: If you recall episode two, unit 01 didn't have eyes to start with either.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon May 23, 2005 12:28 pm *Ahem* Sorry about that, had a little brain fart. You're right, of course.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 23, 2005 12:49 pm He he hee. Brain Fart!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 23, 2005 1:07 pm DirtyHamster wrote: Well they seem to be able to move about exceptionally easily considering they can't see a damn thing!

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 23, 2005 1:10 pm Even for inanimate objects? EDIT... Who's the pinball wizard?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 23, 2005 1:32 pm DirtyHamster wrote: Even for inanimate objects?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 23, 2005 1:39 pm Mr. Tines wrote: DirtyHamster wrote: Who's the pinball wizard?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon May 23, 2005 4:33 pm they don't have a dominant soul like the other evas e.g. yui -unit 01. so it could be a representation of that or we could just be looking too deep into things again.......

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon May 23, 2005 9:02 pm Eva Unit-00 = 1 eye Eva Unit-01 = 2 eyes Eva Unit-02 = 4 eyes 1 + 2 + 4 = 7 7 = 7 eyes of God 7 + (0*9) = 7 (still) Yeah, I'm not feeling to literate right now.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon May 23, 2005 9:10 pm Would the notes GAINAX gave to however designed the MP Evas be findable? If the description explicity said that they were not to have eyes, it would mean something.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 24, 2005 12:37 am Nobody wonders how the Angels without eyes get around. Eyes aren't the only way to perceive one's environment, ya know. Although it's been pointed out that the harpies turn their heads as if "looking" in a direction; I suppose whatever they sense with is located in those "kowai kao" of theirs. I don't really see any reason why they wouldnt have a soul, it's kind of implied evas need to have a soul to operate in episode 24.

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama » Tue May 24, 2005 3:34 am yeah, in episode 14 where the three pilots (Shinjin, Asuka and Rei) were put into the sync test, Shinji and Rei did the test in both unit 00 and 01, only Asuka was staying in her unit 02 the whole time, that could sort of be explained by the gene relation hypothesis as we know Shinji and Rei are of the same lineage (both carries Yui's gene), therefore they could still sync on a mental level while cross-pilot their evas. (btw I forgot whether it was that in episode 14 when Rei had dreamlike feelings during the sync test was she in Shinji's unit 01 or her own eva?)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 24, 2005 12:03 pm She was in EVA-01.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Tue May 24, 2005 1:42 pm Who agrees with this? If the MP Evas had eyes, whould they have kicked Asukas butt ? (please don't hate me if your an Asuka fan)
summary:
[]: Windows To The Soul             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 23, 2005 11:25 am Hey, how come the mass produced Evas are the only Evas without eyes? I know your eyes are considered windows to the soul but does this have anything to do with it?

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Mon May 23, 2005 11:33 am just off of the top of my head- so probably wrong, but: they do
